overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek approaching the Lighthouse of Alexandria, then transitioning to the top platform where he walks around the beacon fire as day transitions to dusk. The clip showcases classical Greco-Egyptian architecture and panoramic coastal views.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the lighthouse entrance along the paved approach

entered.detail: tall white stone tower with multiple tiers and red banners
low stone building with columns and red roof trim
large classical statue flanking the entrance
sparse trees along the left side of the approach

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a stone-paved approach toward the massive Lighthouse of Alexandria. The white stone tower dominates the center of the frame with classical wing buildings and statues flanking the entrance. The sky is clear and blue, indicating bright daylight with warm golden hour tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular lighthouse top platform with beacon fire

events.description: scene cuts from ground level to the top platform of the lighthouse
sun sets below horizon transitioning scene from golden hour to blue hour dusk

agents.ego_description: walking around the circular platform, circling the beacon fire and admiring the panoramic coastal view

entered.detail: tall fluted marble columns supporting the lighthouse top structure
large cylindrical iron cage containing burning fire beacon
expansive view of ancient coastal city with buildings and harbor
open water of the harbor reflecting the changing sky colors
piles of straw and wooden logs near the columns

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto the circular top platform of the lighthouse, walking around massive marble columns and a burning iron beacon. As the character circles the platform, the lighting gradually shifts from warm daylight to cool blue hour dusk, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of the coastal city and harbor below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand architectural approach toward the summit of the Lighthouse of Alexandria as bright daylight fades into a cool dusk. It begins with the character walking along a stone-paved path toward the massive white stone tower, flanked by classical wing buildings and statues under a clear, golden sky. As the character ascends and emerges onto the circular top platform, the perspective shifts to circle around massive marble columns and a burning iron beacon. The lighting then gradually transitions from warm golden tones to the deep blues of the blue hour, expanding the view to reveal a breathtaking panoramic vista of the coastal city and harbor below.
